languages.text:
{n}Батошски согласно хмыкает, окидывая взглядом Клеть:{/n}
"Я и не хотел никуда улетать. Так что мне подходит. Не беспокойтесь, Ваша Светлость, вашу новую колонию в обиду я не дам".

{n}Batoshski makes a sound of agreement and glances around the Cage.{/n} "I never really wanted to leave. So that suits me just fine. Don't worry, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I won't let anything happen to your new colony."
languages.original_text:
{n}Батошски согласно хмыкает, окидывая взглядом Клеть:{/n}
"Я и не хотел никуда улетать. Так что мне подходит. Не беспокойтесь, Ваша Светлость, вашу новую колонию в обиду я не дам".

traits.locale_text:
{n}Batoshski makes a sound of agreement, glancing around the Cage:{/n}
"I didn't really want to go anywhere. So that suits me just fine. Don't worry, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I won't let anything happen to your new colony."

{n}Batoshski makes a sound of agreement and glances around the Cage.{/n} "I never really wanted to leave. So that suits me just fine. Don't worry, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I won't let anything happen to your new colony."

{n}Batoshski makes a sound of agreement, glancing around Tsar-Cage:{/n}
"I didn't really want to go anywhere. So that suits me just fine. Don't worry, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I won't let anything happen to your new colony."

{n}Batoshski makes a sound of agreement, glancing around the Cage:{/n}
"I didn't really want to go anywhere. So that suits me just fine. Don't worry, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I won't let anything happen to your new colony."

{n}Batoshski makes a sound of agreement and glances around the Cage.{/n} "I never really wanted to leave. So that suits me just fine. Don't worry, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I won't let anything happen to your new colony."

languages.text:
{n}バトシュスキーはツァール・ケージの周囲に目を走らせ、同意を示す声を漏らす。{/n}
「別にどこかへ行きたいわけでもなかった。だからちょうどいい。ご心配なく、{mf|閣下|閣下}。あなたの新しいコロニーに何か起こるようなことは、私がさせません」
languages.original_text:
{n}Batoshski makes a sound of agreement, glancing around Tsar-Cage:{/n}
"I didn't really want to go anywhere. So that suits me just fine. Don't worry, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I won't let anything happen to your new colony."

traits.locale_text:
{n}バトシュスキーはツァール・ケージの周囲に目を走らせ、同意を示す声を漏らす。{/n}
「別にどこかへ行きたいわけでもなかった。だからちょうどいい。ご心配なく、{mf|閣下|閣下}。あなたの新しいコロニーに何か起こるようなことは、私がさせません。」

languages.text: {n}Batoshski émet un son d'approbation en balayant la Cage du regard.{/n} « Je n'ai jamais vraiment voulu partir, donc ça me convient très bien. Ne vous inquiétez pas, Votre Seigneurie, je veillerai sur votre nouvelle colonie. »
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski makes a sound of agreement and glances around the Cage.{/n} "I never really wanted to leave. So that suits me just fine. Don't worry, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I won't let anything happen to your new colony."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski émet un son d'approbation en balayant la Cage du regard.{/n} « Je n'ai jamais vraiment voulu partir, donc ça me convient très bien. Ne vous inquiétez pas, Votre Seigneurie, je veillerai sur votre nouvelle colonie. »

languages.text:
{n}Batoshski, Kafes'e göz atarak sesiyle onaylıyor."{/n}
"Gitmeyi hiç istemedim. O yüzden bu mevki bana gayet uygun. Gözünüz arkada kalmasın {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, yeni koloninize bir şey olmasına izin vermeyeceğim."
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski makes a sound of agreement and glances around the Cage.{/n} "I never really wanted to leave. So that suits me just fine. Don't worry, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I won't let anything happen to your new colony."

traits.locale_text:
{n}Batoshski, Kafes'e göz atarak sesiyle onaylıyor."{/n}
"Gitmeyi hiç istemedim. O yüzden bu mevki bana gayet uygun. Gözünüz arkada kalmasın {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, yeni koloninize bir şey olmasına izin vermeyeceğim."

languages.text: {n}Batoshski macht ein zustimmendes Geräusch und lässt seinen Blick durch den Käfig schweifen.{/n} "Ich wollte nie wirklich gehen. Mir ist das also ganz recht. Keine Sorge, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, ich lasse nicht zu, dass Eurer neuen Kolonie etwas zustößt."
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski makes a sound of agreement and glances around the Cage.{/n} "I never really wanted to leave. So that suits me just fine. Don't worry, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I won't let anything happen to your new colony."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski macht ein zustimmendes Geräusch und lässt seinen Blick durch den Käfig schweifen.{/n} "Ich wollte nie wirklich gehen. Mir ist das also ganz recht. Keine Sorge, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, ich lasse nicht zu, dass Eurer neuen Kolonie etwas zustößt."

languages.text: {n}Batoshski expresa su aprobación y recorre la Jaula con la mirada.{/n} «No quería ir a ninguna otra parte, así que me parece perfecto. No se preocupe, mi{mf|lord|lady}, no dejaré que le ocurra nada a su nueva colonia».
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski makes a sound of agreement and glances around the Cage.{/n} "I never really wanted to leave. So that suits me just fine. Don't worry, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I won't let anything happen to your new colony."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski expresa su aprobación y recorre la Jaula con la mirada.{/n} «No quería ir a ninguna otra parte, así que me parece perfecto. No se preocupe, mi{mf|lord|lady}, no dejaré que le ocurra nada a su nueva colonia».

languages.text: {n}巴托什斯基应了一声表示赞同，目光扫过牢笼。{/n}“我从没想过要离开，所以这正合我意。别担心，大人，您的新殖民地绝不会出半点差池。”
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski makes a sound of agreement and glances around the Cage.{/n} "I never really wanted to leave. So that suits me just fine. Don't worry, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I won't let anything happen to your new colony."

traits.locale_text: {n}巴托什斯基应了一声表示赞同，目光扫过牢笼。{/n}“我从没想过要离开，所以这正合我意。别担心，大人，您的新殖民地绝不会出半点差池。”
